data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Visually appealing design that encourages user trust and engagement.
data.technical_spec: Modern UI Design, Material Design Principles

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplification of decision-making by minimizing choices.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Designs elements for faster interaction by optimizing button sizes and positions.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Organizes content into smaller, manageable chunks to aid memorability.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Designs interfaces consistent with user expectations based on other familiar platforms.
data.technical_spec: Standard Web Patterns, Consistent Visual Language
